items.line_en: We're all learning how to work differently.

coach.say: We're all learning how to work differently.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We're all learning how to work differently.

items.line_en: But you still need to get your messages out there in a clear, safe and effective way.

coach.say: But you still need to get your messages out there in a clear, safe and effective way.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But you still need to get your messages out there in a clear, / safe and effective way.

items.line_en: Please.FI is offering a package of short animations to enable you to communicate while remaining respectful of social and physical distancing.

coach.say: Please.FI is offering a package of short animations to enable you to communicate while remaining respectful of social and physical distancing.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Please.FI is offering a package of short animations to enable you to communicate while remaining respectful of social and / physical distancing.

items.line_en: Using a range of techniques, we're able to create dynamic videos that meet your specific needs in multiple languages without having to travel to your premises or compromise your safety.

coach.say: Using a range of techniques, we're able to create dynamic videos that meet your specific needs in multiple languages without having to travel to your premises or compromise your safety.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Using a range of techniques, / we're able to create dynamic videos that meet your specific needs in multiple languages without having to travel to your premises or compromise your safety.

items.line_en: Whether it's giving advice on how to adapt to this new environment, announcements on new initiatives and business practices, or simply letting others know that you're there.

coach.say: Whether it's giving advice on how to adapt to this new environment, announcements on new initiatives and business practices, or simply letting others know that you're there.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Whether it's giving advice on how to adapt to this new environment, / announcements on new initiatives and business practices, / or simply letting others know that you're there.

items.line_en: We provide content that's on message and on-brand and can deliver at a pace that matches your organizational business.

items.line_en: Because today, an online presence is more important than ever.

coach.hint: Chunk it: Because today, / an online presence is more important than ever.

items.line_en: If you think you could benefit from our services, please get in contact today.
